{{Quote|I'm so happy.|Kerlay Utanks|<ref name="HNN" />}}
A '''limmie''' team played for the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Fwillsving]] in the [[Galactic Cup of Limmie]]. On the [[Great ReSynchronization|date]] [[22 BBY/Legends|13:3:14]], an issue of [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News']] [[HoloNet News CoCo District Edition|CoCo District Edition]] reported that the team's single-score victory over the planet [[Kubindi/Legends|Kubindi's]] [[Team Kubindi|team]] inspired a riot that saw that four million [[Limmie/Legends|limmie]] enthusiasts express their jubilation by looting, vandalizing, and partying in the streets of [[Svitalos]], the [[City/Legends|city]] on Fwillsving in which the game was held. One [[Merchant/Legends|merchant]], [[Kerlay Utanks]], marked the occasion by exploding a number of [[Thermal detonator/Legends|thermal detonators]] in his own store.<ref name="HNN" />

==Behind the scenes==
Team Fwillsving was mentioned in an issue of the [[HoloNet News (original website)|HoloNet News feed]], [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 47|Volume 531, Issue 47]], which was written from an [[in-universe]] perspective and published in [[2002]].<ref name="HNN" /> The issue was written by [[Pablo Hidalgo]] and [[Paul Ens]].<ref name="credits">{{HoloNetNewsWeb||credits.html|Credits}}</ref>
